dropped_source_cap.summary: arXiv:2606.01810v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Current benchmarks for embodied vision-language planning often favor linguistic next-token prediction over physically grounded next-state reasoning. We argue that reliable physical autonomy requires a shift from linguistically grounded token prediction toward physically grounded causal reasoning.
